explanation: The requirement specifies that the characteristics of the breathing cycle are defined when the system is operating in PCV (Pressure Controlled Ventilation) mode. This implies a continuous property that holds as long as the system is in PCV mode. Therefore, the 'After bool_exp1 until bool_exp2, _ABSTRACT_VAR1_' template for decision1 is chosen, with bool_exp1 representing the activation of PCV mode and bool_exp2 representing its deactivation. Within this scope, the conditions defining the breathing cycle must 'always' hold, leading to 'it is always the case that bool_exp3 holds' for decision2. Bool_exp3 combines the atomic propositions that represent the definitions related to respiratory rate (RR_PCV) and the inspiratory/expiratory ratio (I:E PCV). The part of the requirement regarding 'inspiratory pressure Pinsp_PCV relative to atmosphere' describes a characteristic of the PCV mode itself and is not represented by a distinct atomic boolean proposition that can be evaluated as true or false independently, thus it cannot be included in bool_exp3.
decision2: it is always the case that bool_exp3 holds
decision2_substring: the breathing cycle shall be defined by inspiratory pressure Pinsp_PCV relative to atmosphere, respiratory rate (RR_PCV) and the ratio between the inspiratory and expiratory times (I:E PCV ).
output_structured_natural_language: After PCVMode until !PCVMode, it is always the case that breathingCycleTime_equalTo_1_divideBy_RR_PCV & ExpiratoryTime_equalTo_breathingCycleTime_divideBy_1_plus_ItoE_PCV holds

explanation: The property states that globally, it is always the case that if the system is in PCV mode, then the breathing cycle time is equal to 1/RR_PCV and the expiratory time is defined by the breathing cycle time divided by (1 + I:E_PCV). This captures how the breathing cycle is defined by respiratory rate and the inspiratory-to-expiratory ratio in PCV mode. The aspect of 'inspiratory pressure Pinsp_PCV relative to atmosphere' could not be fully captured as there is no specific atomic proposition representing this general definition.
decision2: it is always the case that bool_exp3 holds
decision2_substring: the breathing cycle shall be defined by inspiratory pressure Pinsp_PCV relative to atmosphere, respiratory rate (RR_PCV) and the ratio between the inspiratory and expiratory times (I:E PCV ).
